title: Test sharding for monorepo packages
scenario_context: Monorepo with 12 packages; CI runs all sequentially.
what_should_be_tested: Per-package parallel testing.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. CI matrix runs vitest --project=<name> in parallel.
2. Or turbo run test in topological order.
solution:
/*
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        package: [auth, billing, ui, api, shared]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm --filter @repo/${{matrix.package}} test
*/
mock_strategy: For test-216, Test sharding for monorepo packages, mock only nondeterministic clocks, random ids, or external network providers. Keep the real infrastructure boundary, serializers, auth/session shape, and the assertion target visible: Per-package parallel testing.. Deterministic seed 216 reproduces failures.

Flake policy: one retry only for infrastructure-class failures, then quarantine with owner and failing seed.

title: Risk-based testing prioritization
scenario_context: All tests equally weighted; resources spent on low-risk areas while high-risk crashes ship.
what_should_be_tested: High-risk paths (payments, auth, data integrity) tested most; low-risk (admin internal tools) tested less.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Map: blast radius × probability of bug.
2. Payments: high blast, high test budget. Internal admin: low blast, smoke only.
3. Document in test plan.
solution:
/*
# Risk-based test priorities

## Tier 1 — must have property + mutation + integration + E2E
- Authentication and authorization
- Payment processing
- Data persistence (writes that can corrupt)
- Public API contracts

## Tier 2 — unit + integration
- Business logic (billing, scheduling)
- Reusable UI components
- Internal services

## Tier 3 — smoke + minimal unit
- Admin tools used by employees
- One-off scripts
- Generated code

## Coverage targets
- Tier 1: 90%+ branch, 80%+ mutation
- Tier 2: 75%+ branch, 60%+ mutation
- Tier 3: 50%+ line, no mutation gate
*/
mock_strategy: For test-240, Risk-based testing prioritization, mock only nondeterministic clocks, random ids, or external network providers. Keep the real test strategy boundary, serializers, auth/session shape, and the assertion target visible: High-risk paths (payments, auth, data integrity) tested most; low-risk (admin internal tools) tested less.. Deterministic seed 240 reproduces failures.
ci_considerations: CI for Risk-based testing prioritization runs with deterministic seed 240, isolated fixture namespace, captured logs/artifacts on failure, max runtime budget tied to test_strategy, and zero hidden network or wall-clock dependency. Flake policy: one retry only for infrastructure-class failures, then quarantine with owner and failing seed.
